Product details

Knitted open-collar polo
16-gauge, 1-ply construction
OEKO-TEX® certified yarn
Short sleeves
Open collar
Ribbed cuffs and hem
Made in Italy

Product composition

100% OEKO-TEX® certified cotton< - 16-gauge, 1-ply construction

Care instructions

Hand wash inside out
Air dry on a flat surface
Do not tumble dry
Do not bleach
Iron at low temperature

Shipping details

Shipping:

Orders are dispatched within 48 hours via DHL for fast, secure, and traceable delivery.

Delivery Times:

  • France: 1-2 days
  • Europe: 1-4 days
  • Worldwide: 2-6 days

Customs Duties: Covered for select countries (USA, UK, Switzerland, Canada, Australia, Hong Kong, Singapore, Norway, Turkey, Israel, Jordan).

Tracking: Tracking details are sent via email/SMS. DHL On Demand Delivery (ODD) allows rescheduling or alternate delivery options.

Important: Issues (damages/missing items) must be reported within 1 business day post-delivery.

For details, visit our full Shipping Policy.
